sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Exceed World, Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Exceed World, Inc. has released its annual Form 10-K report, detailing financial performance, business operations, and strategic initiatives, focusing on e-learning and multilevel marketing in Japan. The company reported a significant decrease in revenue and a net loss due to reduced recruitment activities for its 'Force Club' premium members. Moving forward, Exceed World plans to expand its sales network, enhance benefits for premium members, and leverage investments in new ventures like the Connector Plan gaming platform to address financial and operational challenges.

feed.title: Buffett Refused A Raise For Decades, His Successor Is Making 250x More To Lead Berkshire Hathaway
feed.summary: Greg Abel has become the new CEO of Berkshire Hathaway, taking over from Warren Buffett. Abel's base salary is $25 million, which is 250 times more than Buffett's $100,000 annual salary. Buffett famously refused raises for decades, maintaining a frugal lifestyle and demonstrating dedication to the company and shareholders.

feed.title: AlphaTON Capital raises $15 million in registered direct offering
feed.summary: AlphaTON Capital Corp (NASDAQ:ATON) has announced a registered direct offering to sell 15 million ordinary shares at $1.00 each, aiming to raise $15 million in gross proceeds. The funds will be used to scale its Cocoon AI initiative, for working capital, and general corporate purposes. This comes amidst recent acquisitions of NVIDIA chips for its AI infrastructure and denials of strategic investments from other companies.

feed.title: Form 424B2 GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
feed.summary: This SEC Form 424B2 filing by Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details the pricing supplement for Equity Index Linked Securities due January 12, 2029. These auto-callable securities with contingent coupon and contingent downside principal at risk are linked to the lowest performing of the S&P 500®, Russell 2000®, and EURO STOXX 50® Indexes. The document outlines the terms, potential risks, hypothetical returns, and tax considerations for investors, emphasizing that returns depend on the performance of the lowest performing index.

feed.title: TRNR Provides Shareholder Update on Sportstech Process & Operating Strategy
feed.summary: Interactive Strength Inc. (TRNR) has issued a shareholder letter to update investors on the Sportstech loan and acquisition process. The company also provided additional information about its improved operating scale and near-term plans. TRNR, known for its Wattbike, CLMBR, and FORME fitness brands, encourages shareholders to visit its website for further updates.

feed.title: Elevating early-career scientists with bold ideas | Takeda Stories
feed.summary: Takeda's Innovators in Science Award supports early-career researchers in gastrointestinal and inflammatory diseases, neuroscience, and oncology. This year, the program expanded its impact, offering $400,000 in prizes and a 12-month career development program administered by Nature Masterclasses. The award received a record 315 submissions, with increased global reach and expanded eligibility criteria, including more female applicants.

feed.title: Kosmos Energy (KOS) Price Target Decreased by 18.47% to 2.25
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Kosmos Energy (KOS) has been reduced by 18.47% to $2.25 per share, down from the previous estimate of $2.76. This new target reflects an 81.55% increase from the last reported closing price of $1.24 per share. Institutional ownership data shows a decrease in the number of funds holding KOS and a slight decrease in total shares owned, despite a bullish put/call ratio of 0.20.

feed.title: Omnicom Group (OMC) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
feed.summary: Shares of Omnicom Group (OMC) rose by 3.9% after BNP Paribas Exane increased its price target for the company from $115 to $120, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating. This optimistic analyst outlook contributed to a broader positive market sentiment for the stock, which has seen limited volatility over the past year. Despite a flat performance year-to-date, the stock currently trades near its 52-week high, reflecting stable investor confidence.

feed.title: Amicus Therapeutics stock hits 52-week high at 14.36 USD
feed.summary: Amicus Therapeutics (FOLD) stock reached a 52-week high of $14.36, representing a 54.85% increase over the past year, reflecting strong investor confidence. This surge follows a strong Q3 2025 earnings report which surpassed analyst expectations, and a $4.8 billion all-cash acquisition offer from BioMarin Pharmaceutical. However, analyst ratings were subsequently downgraded to Market Perform/Hold due to the acquisition.

feed.title: Tesla puts full self-driving behind a monthly paywall
feed.summary: Tesla has announced that its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) software will transition to a monthly subscription model starting February 14, discontinuing the one-time purchase option. This move, driven in part by a recent shareholder-approved pay package for CEO Elon Musk tied to achieving 10 million FSD subscriptions, coincides with increased competition and scrutiny over the software's capabilities and marketing. The change reflects Tesla's ongoing strategy to monetize its advanced driver-assistance features amidst challenges in its EV market share and robotaxi development.

feed.title: State Street Corp stock hits all-time high at 134.67 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: State Street Corp (STT) stock recently reached an all-time high of $134.67, reflecting a 43.32% increase over the past year and a 22.38% return over six months. Despite this rally, the stock appears undervalued with a P/E ratio of 14.23 and a dividend yield of 2.53%, having maintained dividends for 56 consecutive years. The company's strategic moves, robust earnings, and expansion of global footprint contribute to market analysts' optimism, although Barclays recently downgraded its rating to Equalweight while raising its price target to $152.00.

feed.title: ROK Rockwell Automation (NYSE) 14 Jan 2026: $415.92, AI boosts margins
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation (ROK) stock is trading at $415.92, near its 52-week high, driven by strong industrial automation demand tied to AI. The company exhibits robust fundamentals with high valuation metrics, reflecting market expectations for growth and digital services. While technicals indicate steady momentum, Meyka AI's forecast projects a potential downside, suggesting valuation risks despite a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus.

feed.title: Netherlands places order with Oshkosh Defense of up to $30M
feed.summary: Oshkosh Corporation has secured an additional contract with the Netherlands Ministry of Defence for Dutch Expeditionary Patrol Vehicles (DXPV), valued between $25 million and $30 million. This follows a previous order for 150 Joint Light Tactical Vehicle variants and includes two DXPV training kits. The news comes as Oshkosh Corp. plans to lay off 160 workers due to a decline in third-quarter sales.

feed.title: Blackstone partners with Empower to bring private markets to 401(k)s (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone (BX) is partnering with Empower to offer private market investments to everyday investors through 401(k) retirement accounts. This collaboration aims to allow participants to access private markets via Empower's new investment program.

feed.title: Who is Apple's new Creator Studio subscription actually for?
feed.summary: Apple has introduced Creator Studio, a new subscription service bundling creative tools like Final Cut Pro, Logic Pro, and Pixelmator Pro. The author argues that this offering struggles to find its niche, being too complex for casual users accustomed to Canva but too lightweight for professionals who rely on Adobe's comprehensive suite. The article highlights the strong competition from both Adobe Creative Cloud and the increasingly powerful and often free alternatives like Blackmagic Design’s Resolve and Canva-owned Affinity suite, questioning the value proposition of Apple's new subscription.

feed.title: Xcel defends storage ownership in distributed capacity pilot
feed.summary: Xcel Energy plans to modify its Capacity*Connect distributed battery proposal following stakeholder feedback but maintains that the company should own the storage assets to benefit customers. The proposal, which seeks authorization for front-of-meter batteries (1 MW-3 MW) by 2028 with a budget of $152-430 million, faces criticism from solar groups concerned about cost, risk to ratepayers, and lack of competition, advocating for third-party ownership instead. Xcel, however, argues that its ownership ensures safe, reliable operation and maximizes value to customers through participation in MISO markets, while also committing to additional reporting and refining cost analysis.

feed.title: WAB: JP Morgan Raises Price Target to $245, Maintains Neutral Ra
feed.summary: JP Morgan has maintained a Neutral rating for Westinghouse Air Brake (WAB) but increased its price target from $215.00 to $245.00, a 13.95% rise. This follows other analysts like Morgan Stanley, Citigroup, and Wolfe Research who have also recently updated their ratings and price targets for WAB. The average target price from 12 analysts is $235.13, suggesting a 4.25% upside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) to $142 from $133, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a potential upside of over 19%. This upgrade comes despite PACCAR missing quarterly EPS estimates, though its revenue surpassed analyst expectations. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts and has strong institutional ownership.

feed.title: The Truth About Alliant Energy Corp.: Boring Utility Stock or Low-Key Power Play?
feed.summary: This article evaluates Alliant Energy Corp. (LNT) as a potential investment, contrasting its steady, dividend-paying utility stock nature with the high-volatility tech market. It highlights the company's stability, consistent dividends, and gradual growth through infrastructure projects, positioning it as a defensive play for long-term, income-focused investors. The piece concludes by advising investors to consider whether they seek portfolio stability or high-growth speculative trades.

feed.title: Guidewire Software, American Express Global Business Travel, Appian, Braze, and Fastly Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Guidewire Software, American Express Global Business Travel, Appian, Braze, and Fastly fell following a tech stock pullback. This decline was triggered by reports of China blocking Nvidia's H200 AI chips and broadened by concerns over the Justice Department's investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell and rising oil prices. These events created a pivot from growth to defensive stocks, though such drops can present buying opportunities for high-quality companies.

feed.title: Domino’s Pizza Reclaims Throne Through Tech and Value Plays
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza has re-established its leadership in the quick-service pizza industry by leveraging aggressive digital innovation, strategic value pricing, and operational efficiencies. The company's significant investment in technology drives 85% of its sales through digital platforms, while deals like the "Perfect Combo" boost order volumes and customer loyalty. These strategies, combined with streamlined supply chains and international expansion, have enabled Domino's to outpace competitors and achieve strong financial results.

feed.title: Assessing Caterpillar: Insights From 18 Financial Analysts
feed.summary: Eighteen financial analysts have recently provided ratings for Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT), with an average 12-month price target of $609.22, marking a 14.62% increase from the previous average. The ratings range from bullish to somewhat bearish, reflecting diverse perspectives on the company's future performance. Caterpillar, a global leader in construction and mining equipment, demonstrates strong revenue growth, high net margins, and impressive returns on equity and assets, despite a higher-than-average debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: PG&E extends bill relief program for customers
feed.summary: PG&E has announced the extension of its "Match My Payment Program" into 2026, offering financial assistance to low-to moderate-income customers struggling with energy bills. The program provides a dollar-for-dollar match up to $1,000 for past-due bills, preventing service disconnections. Alongside the REACH program, it has already distributed nearly $22 million to over 60,000 customers across various counties.

feed.title: With 75% institutional ownership, Horizon Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ:HBNC) is a favorite amongst the big guns
feed.summary: Horizon Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ:HBNC) is largely owned by institutional investors, holding a 75% stake in the company. This significant ownership suggests that the stock price is sensitive to their trading activities and movements. While institutional investment can indicate credibility, individual investors should also consider the company's past earnings trajectory and analyst recommendations.

feed.title: How Novartis' Alzheimer’s Antibody Deal And US Radioligand Expansion At Novartis (SWX:NOVN) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Novartis recently announced a global licensing and collaboration deal with SciNeuro Pharmaceuticals for an Alzheimer’s amyloid beta antibody program, alongside plans for a new radioligand therapy manufacturing facility in Florida. These strategic moves deepen Novartis’s presence in complex therapies, coupling early-stage neuroscience innovation with expanded US production capabilities. While these developments reinforce the company's long-term strategy, investors are also eyeing upcoming Q4 earnings and potential impacts from pricing pressures and generic competition.

feed.title: Bullish Mid Penn Bancorp Insiders Loaded Up On US$899.4k Of Stock
feed.summary: Mid Penn Bancorp insiders have shown bullish sentiment by purchasing US$899.4k worth of stock over the last year, with recent noteworthy investments totaling US$141k from seven insiders. This buying activity, coupled with a 3.9% insider ownership representing US$28m, suggests confidence in the company's future prospects. The purchases were made at prices close to the current stock value, indicating insiders see value at present levels.

feed.title: iShares Russell 1000 Growth ETF (IWF) Stock Price, Holdings, Dividend Yield
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the iShares Russell 1000 Growth ETF (IWF), including its stock price, key statistics, fundamental data, and dividend information. It also lists the ETF's top holdings as of September 30, 2025, which include NVIDIA, Microsoft, Apple, Broadcom, and Amazon. The fund holds 391 stocks with a total value of $121.96 billion and a turnover rate of 1%.

feed.title: Definity closes C$3.3 bn acquisition of Travelers Canada insurance operations
feed.summary: Definity Financial has completed the C$3.3 billion acquisition of most of Travelers Canada's insurance operations, excluding surety. This deal significantly increases Definity's market presence, projecting it to become one of Canada's top five P&C insurers with C$6 billion in annual premiums. Travelers plans to use part of the sale proceeds for share buybacks and expects the transaction to be slightly accretive to its earnings per share from 2026.

feed.title: Marsh & McLennan Companies (MMC) Stock: Drops as Company Declares $0.90 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Marsh & McLennan Companies (MMC) announced a $0.90 per share quarterly dividend, payable in February 2026, marking 55 consecutive years of dividend payments and 16 years of increases. Despite this commitment to shareholder returns and a new $6 billion share repurchase program, the stock experienced a 1.58% drop, underperforming the broader market over the past year. The company will also change its NYSE ticker from MMC to MRSH in January 2026.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Positive Forecast for Cummins (NYSE:CMI) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Cummins (NYSE:CMI) stock from $485.00 to $580.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 3.13% from the current price. Cummins recently exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, despite a slight year-over-year revenue decline, and trades near $562.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Herc (NYSE:HRI) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Herc (NYSE:HRI) stock from $150 to $165, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a 4.72% upside. Analyst consensus for Herc is a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $176.57, reflecting a generally positive outlook although shares traded down on Wednesday. The company's recent quarterly earnings topped estimates with $2.22 EPS and revenue of $1.30 billion, beating analyst expectations.

feed.title: Verizon outage: What could be the real reason as Verizon Communications wireless services down, mobile pho
feed.summary: Verizon Communications experienced a widespread outage affecting mobile and data services in major US cities, with some users seeing "SOS" on their devices. This outage occurred days after the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) revised a rule requiring Verizon to unlock mobile phones 60 days post-activation, a practice Verizon claimed led to hundreds of millions in fraud losses annually due to handset trafficking. The FCC's rule change aimed to close a loophole exploited by criminal networks reselling stolen unlocked phones internationally.

feed.title: SLB in talks with US officials, Chevron to expand in Venezuela - FT
feed.summary: SLB is reportedly in discussions with U.S. officials and Chevron to explore expanding its operations in Venezuela. This potential expansion aligns with recent U.S. sanctions relief on the country's oil and gas sector.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean continues to cancel stops to its private Haiti destination
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Cruise Lines has extended the suspension of its calls to the private destination of Labadee, Haiti, until the end of 2026 due to an "abundance of caution." This decision further impacts Haiti's already struggling tourism sector and the livelihoods of hundreds of local families who rely on cruise ship visitors for income. The country faces ongoing challenges with gang violence, a Level 4 "Do not travel" warning, and limited international air travel access.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Sells Off Shares of Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL)
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. (D-California) recently sold shares of Halliburton Company (NYSE:HAL) in a transaction disclosed on January 12th, indicating a sale of $1,001 to $15,000 worth of stock on December 19th. This sale is part of a series of recent trades by the Representative, involving various companies. Halliburton's stock traded up on Wednesday, and the company recently posted strong quarterly earnings, exceeding analyst expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Sells Off Shares of Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX)
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. (D-California) recently sold between $1,001 and $15,000 in shares of Boston Scientific Corporation on December 24th. This transaction was part of several recent trades by the Representative, involving various other companies. Boston Scientific's stock has seen recent analyst comments and institutional trading activity, with insiders also selling a significant number of shares recently.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Sells Off Shares of Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR)
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. (D-California) recently sold between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) stock on December 24th. This transaction was part of several trades made by the representative in late 2025, involving both sales of various stocks and a purchase of Campbell's stock. Quanta Services' stock performance, financial metrics, recent earnings report, and institutional ownership are also detailed, alongside analyst forecasts and insider selling activity by company directors and executives.

feed.title: Exclusive: Chevron expected to receive expanded Venezuela license from US this week, oil industry sources say
feed.summary: Chevron is anticipated to receive an expanded license from the U.S. this week, which could enable the company to increase oil production in Venezuela. Oil industry sources informed Reuters of this development. Chevron stated that it operates in compliance with all relevant laws, regulations, and sanctions frameworks.

feed.title: Chevron stock hits 52-week high at 168.99 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Chevron's stock has reached a 52-week high of $168.99, demonstrating a 6.61% increase over the past year and reflecting strong investor confidence despite fluctuating energy prices. The company is actively involved in significant international oil exploration and acquisition discussions, including potential projects in Mexico and a bid to acquire Lukoil's international assets. BMO Capital maintains an Outperform rating with a $170 price target, highlighting Chevron's strategic positioning within the global energy sector.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Goes Live with MEDITECH Expanse Across 43 Hospitals
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare has achieved a major milestone in its 30-year partnership with MEDITECH by implementing the MEDITECH Expanse EHR in 43 hospitals. This large-scale deployment is the initial phase of an enterprise-wide rollout intended to more seamlessly integrate data and accelerate the adoption of AI and digital innovations across HCA Healthcare's extensive network. The cloud-based Expanse system offers intuitive mobile workflows, embedded clinical decision support, and AI capabilities to enhance patient safety, quality, and operational efficiency as part of HCA's digital transformation strategy.

feed.title: Most Delivered Light-Entry Jet Cessna Citation M2 Gen2 With Garmin Autothrottles Enters Into Service, Bringing Greater Control and Precision to Pilots
feed.summary: The Cessna Citation M2 Gen2, equipped with Garmin Autothrottles, has officially entered service after receiving FAA certification in October 2025. This integration enhances the aircraft's capabilities, offering pilots greater control and precision, and solidifying its position as the most delivered light-entry jet. The M2 Gen2 also boasts premium interior styling, productivity features like wireless charging, and improved cockpit ergonomics, while Textron Aviation provides extensive global aftermarket support.

feed.title: EQT slides as U.S. natural gas futures sink on LNG feedgas drop
feed.summary: EQT Corp shares fell roughly 3% due to a drop in U.S. natural gas futures, driven by reduced flows to LNG export facilities in Texas. Other gas producers like Antero and Range also slipped, while Coterra saw a slight gain. Traders are closely watching upcoming storage reports and potential increases in LNG feedgas amid colder weather forecasts.

feed.title: FCC Decision Boosts Red Cat Holdings’ Market Position
feed.summary: Red Cat Holdings Inc. (RCAT) saw its stock rise by 10.99% following the FCC's decision to restrict foreign-made drones, a move expected to significantly benefit American manufacturers like Red Cat. This regulatory change, aligning with national defense strategies, is seen as a catalyst for growth and increased market influence for the company, despite existing challenges in profitability and liquidity. Investors view this as a positive shift, positioning Red Cat to leverage strategic alliances and expand market reach.

feed.title: Important CFTC No-Action Relief for Private Fund Sponsors
feed.summary: The CFTC's Market Participants Division issued interim no-action relief for private fund sponsors, similar to the former QEP Exemption, on December 19, 2025. This relief exempts investment advisers from CPO/CTA registration if they launch private funds offered solely to Qualified Eligible Persons (QEPs) and meet specific conditions, including SEC registration, Form PF filing, and notice to CFTC staff. It offers significant flexibility, particularly for 3(c)(7) funds, by reducing regulatory burdens and allowing broader use of futures and swaps.

feed.title: Mesa Air Group (NASDAQ:RJET) Shares Down 5.1% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Mesa Air Group (NASDAQ:RJET) saw its shares drop 5.1% to $18.50 on Wednesday, with significantly lower trading volume than average, indicating weak intraday demand. The company currently holds a consensus "Sell" rating, despite a recent "Hold" upgrade from Wall Street Zen, and is unprofitable with a market cap of $499.1 million, trading below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Institutional investors have recently adjusted their positions in RJET, with some increasing and some initiating new stakes.

feed.title: Shareholder-called meeting to vote on ICZOOM's board, management changes
feed.summary: ICZOOM Group (Nasdaq: IZM) has called an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on February 27, 2026, to address proposed changes to its board and management, following a shareholder requisition from December 5, 2025. Shareholders of record as of February 2, 2026, are eligible to vote. The announcement of this meeting led to a significant positive market reaction, with IZM stock gaining 12.50% and increasing its valuation by approximately $3 million.

feed.title: GSI Technology Sees Unusually High Options Volume (NASDAQ:GSIT)
feed.summary: GSI Technology (NASDAQ:GSIT) experienced unusually high options trading volume, with traders acquiring 6,885 call options, a 135% increase above the daily average. This activity occurred as the stock price fell 6.3% to $7.20 on significantly elevated trading volume. The company faces a "Sell" rating from Weiss Ratings due to negative fundamentals, including a negative EPS and net margin, and has seen notable insider selling.

feed.title: Paccar stock hits 52-week high at 119.21 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Paccar Inc. (PCAR) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $119.21, reflecting a 1-year return of 12.39% and a 24.23% gain over six months, despite an overbought RSI and an "overvalued" assessment by InvestingPro's Fair Value. The company also announced an extra cash dividend of $1.40 per share and a regular quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share, while analysts like JPMorgan and Bernstein SocGen Group have upgraded their ratings and price targets, citing anticipated margin recovery and favorable market positioning.

feed.title: GFI Soars 224% in a Year: How Should Investors Play the Stock?
feed.summary: Gold Fields Limited (GFI) has seen its stock price increase by 224% over the past year, significantly outperforming its industry and the S&P 500. The company demonstrated strong operational performance in Q3 2025, driven by increased gold-equivalent production, particularly from its Salares Norte mine, and effective cost management. While the stock shows a bullish trend with favorable technical indicators and rising earnings estimates, analysts suggest a "hold" stance due to potential near-term headwinds like project execution risks and gold price volatility.

feed.title: Here's what to expect from Corteva's next earnings report
feed.summary: This article focuses on the upcoming earnings report for Corteva (NYSE: CTVA). It will likely delve into analyst estimates for revenue and earnings per share, compare them to previous periods, and potentially discuss factors impacting the company's performance. The article aims to inform investors about what to anticipate from Corteva's next financial disclosure.
